note: POV (kodifitzwell) shipped as a Gears ALTERNATIVE (optional). Primary repo kodifitzwell.github.io is EMPTY; kodiyashimaru mirror is the live source (magneto is POV's built-in scraper, version-sibling 6.07.x). Overlay = kodirdil Hebrew subs + genres/ratings patches + curated network logos. Kodi-version-agnostic: one build, both fleets.
changelog: 0.1.0: initial Hebrew overlay re-derived fresh from the current Gears overlay (kodirdil) onto clean POV 6.07.07.
